meta.name: Lumina: CoverRouter UUPS upgrade (M-4 vetoed payout retry fix)
meta.description: Schedule + Execute via TimelockController to call CoverRouter proxy.upgradeToAndCall(newImpl, 0x). New implementation 0x1539647295752Cb37a7AB605f25f044559b99144 was deployed with the M-4 fix in cancelScheduledPayout: it now resets _policyResolved[productId][policyId] to false after a veto so the agent can re-trigger if the event still falls within coverage, and it no longer calls releaseAllocation in the cancel path so collateral stays locked for the re-trigger (cleanupExpiredPolicy releases it at expiry if no re-trigger happens). Source verified on Blockscout. Storage layout unchanged — only function body of cancelScheduledPayout was modified. CoverRouter proxy 0xd5f8678A0F2149B6342F9014CCe6d743234Ca025 owner is the Timelock (verified). Timelock minDelay = 0 (verified). Requires Safe 2-of-3 PROPOSER + EXECUTOR. Empty initializer payload (0x) — no re-initialization needed.
